// ==== Sales/infrastructure/CustomerRepository.ts ====
// <auto-generated/>
import { AggregateStore, InMemoryStore } from '../../infrastructure-runtime';
import { Customer } from '../Customer';
import { ICustomerRepository } from '../repositories/ICustomerRepository';
import { CustomerId } from '../value-objects/CustomerId';

/** In-memory-backed repository for the Customer aggregate root. Inject a persistent AggregateStore to back it with a real datastore; the default in-memory store is runnable in tests. */
export class CustomerRepository implements ICustomerRepository {
  constructor(
    private readonly store: AggregateStore<CustomerId, Customer> = new InMemoryStore<CustomerId, Customer>((entity) => entity.id),
  ) {}

  getById(id: CustomerId): Promise<Customer | undefined> {
    return this.store.get(id);
  }

  add(aggregate: Customer): Promise<void> {
    return this.store.add(aggregate);
  }

  update(aggregate: Customer): Promise<void> {
    return this.store.update(aggregate);
  }

  remove(aggregate: Customer): Promise<void> {
    return this.store.remove(aggregate);
  }
}

// ==== Sales/infrastructure/OrderRepository.ts ====
// <auto-generated/>
import { structuralEquals } from '../../runtime';
import { AggregateStore, InMemoryStore } from '../../infrastructure-runtime';
import { Order } from '../Order';
import { IOrderRepository } from '../repositories/IOrderRepository';
import { CustomerId } from '../value-objects/CustomerId';
import { OrderId } from '../value-objects/OrderId';

/** In-memory-backed repository for the Order aggregate root. Inject a persistent AggregateStore to back it with a real datastore; the default in-memory store is runnable in tests. */
export class OrderRepository implements IOrderRepository {
  constructor(
    private readonly store: AggregateStore<OrderId, Order> = new InMemoryStore<OrderId, Order>((entity) => entity.id),
  ) {}

  getById(id: OrderId): Promise<Order | undefined> {
    return this.store.get(id);
  }

  add(aggregate: Order): Promise<void> {
    return this.store.add(aggregate);
  }

  update(aggregate: Order): Promise<void> {
    return this.store.update(aggregate);
  }

  remove(aggregate: Order): Promise<void> {
    return this.store.remove(aggregate);
  }

  async byCustomer(customer: CustomerId): Promise<readonly Order[]> {
    const all = await this.store.all();
    return all.filter((entity) => structuralEquals(entity.customer, customer));
  }
}

// ==== Sales/infrastructure/UnitOfWork.ts ====
// <auto-generated/>
import { IUnitOfWork } from '../abstractions/IUnitOfWork';
import { ICustomerRepository } from '../repositories/ICustomerRepository';
import { IOrderRepository } from '../repositories/IOrderRepository';
import { CustomerRepository } from './CustomerRepository';
import { OrderRepository } from './OrderRepository';

/** In-memory unit of work over the Sales context's aggregate repositories. */
export class UnitOfWork implements IUnitOfWork {
  constructor(
    readonly orders: IOrderRepository = new OrderRepository(),
    readonly customers: ICustomerRepository = new CustomerRepository(),
  ) {}

  saveChangesAsync(): Promise<void> {
    return Promise.resolve();
  }
}
